sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31090" key="*ei)lio/neia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Εἰλιόνεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31090.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Εἰλείθυια</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.277b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
